title: SRWS-PSG protocol templates
description: A collection of Markdown-based systematic review protocol templates, maintained by SRWS-PSG (Scientific Research WorkS Peer Support Group). Each GitHub release is automatically deposited to Zenodo with a version-specific DOI. The intervention-review template is the successor to the protocols.io V.2 template (DOI 10.17504/protocols.io.81wgbpb41vpk/v2).

creators.name: SRWS-PSG Mentors
creators.affiliation: Scientific Research WorkS Peer Support Group
